title: Create: Stroopwafel
description: What good is a mod that adds windmills but not stroopwafel?
body:
![A stroopwafel in the center with a blueprint-like background and a Dutch flag stretched across](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f26e61a1e947f0efbce7222be6128cdbb402fd3.png)

# Create: Stroopwafel

[!["Made for Create" button, with a cog & shaft crossed with a wrench on the right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0a87716e0fc75dcebe72e947f0a387d60fa16a4.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)

A mod that adds a (somewhat) faithful process for making stroopwafel using Create machines.

## Content

- **Stroopwafel**, made with wafers and syrup
- **Cinnamon**, made by haunting sugarcane and then grinding
- **Blaze Stroopwafel**, a cheaper variant of Blaze Cakes

## Roadmap

*(in a vague order of priority)*

- replace remaining placeholder textures
- ~~cinderflour variant, usable with blaze burners~~ added in v0.2.0!
- port over to Architectury to support NeoForge
- obligatory Dutch translation
- support for using cinnamon from other mods
- add stroopwafel and other ingredients to loot tables
- non-obligatory toki pona translation
- potion variants
